name: zsys_read_tsc64
description: zSys::ReadTsc64 splits a monotonic 64-bit timing counter into high and low dwords. The production source uses QueryPerformanceCounter as a safe functional substitute for the original RDTSC helper.
known_limits: The original helper is an RDTSC-shaped fastcall leaf; current production source preserves caller-visible high/low output behavior but intentionally avoids raw assembly.
Binary Ninja notes show the retail helper has an awkward register-clobber shape around EDX. The functional implementation models intended caller-visible behavior, not the exact register accident.
